rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §21.609 governs reimbursement obligations for a teacher stipend program participant. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and share no operative dependency.
quote: Sec. 21.609. REIMBURSEMENT. (a) A participant in the program who fails to obtain certification or employment as required by the agreement under Section 21.607 or who voluntarily leaves or is terminated for cause from employment after teaching in a public elementary or secondary school in this state for less than two school years shall reimburse the agency for the portion of the stipend that bears the same ratio to the amount of the stipend as the unserved portion of required service bears to the two school years of required service.
_note: No conflict: proposed homestead exemption change has no textual or operational relationship to this educator stipend reimbursement statute.
